policy.description: Blocking line-coverage ratchets. Update measured counts in the same reviewed change whenever scope or coverage advances; never lower a floor without an explicit, justified scope change.

tolerance.rationale: Two clean local Node 22/V8 runs on 2026-07-16 each passed 1060 tests and measured the expanded 2149-line core scope at 1801 covered lines (83.806%). Issue #318 adds the generation-aware feature loader and central manifest runtime, including bounded import concurrency/retries, identity/config/navigation ownership, atomic descriptor and dependency validation, and deterministic activation/disposal tests. Relative to the reviewed 1473/1797 issue #127 baseline, the reviewed core scope grows by 352 instrumented lines and the high-water advances by 328 covered lines while line coverage rises from 81.970%. The existing one-line tolerance is unchanged and permits only the previously reproduced negligible instrumentation variance; coverage-baseline.test.js retains exact below-floor, above-baseline, scope-change, and broad-tolerance negative boundaries.

Two clean local .NET 10.0.9/Coverlet integration runs on 2026-07-16 each passed 1623 tests and measured the identical combined 26889-line assembly scope at the reviewed 18443-line high-water. Issue #155 adds the shared typed Arr QueueResource paginator, complete/incomplete status propagation, and deterministic Sonarr/Radarr regressions for the 1001st download row, action targets beyond the former 100/200-row prefixes, exact and partial boundaries, changing totals, duplicate/non-advancing pages, later-page failure, the aggregate record limit, and malformed scalar/projection records. The reviewed successor restores the prior fetch boundary's exception-to-explicit-incomplete behavior without swallowing caller cancellation. Relative to main's reviewed 18326/26770 Hide Favorites Tab baseline, the reviewed assembly scope grows by 119 instrumented lines and the high-water advances by 117 covered lines to 18443. The existing two-line tolerance is unchanged and covers the reproduced one-line Coverlet variance; coverage-baseline.test.js retains the exact scope-drift, regression, stale-baseline, and broad-tolerance negative boundaries.
